outbreaks.notes: Laboratory-confirmed Andes virus on expedition cruise ship MV Hondius. Only known hantavirus with documented person-to-person transmission. WHO assessed global risk as LOW (4 May 2026). Passengers from 7 nationalities.
Agricultural workers in southern Chile. Genomic sequences deposited to GenBank. Oligochaeta rodent reservoir confirmed. Active surveillance ongoing by Chile MINSAL.
